# Kubeadm Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-kubeadm
kind: Kubeadm
spec:
  action: init
  outputJoinFile: /tmp/deck/join.txt
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Kubeadm
spec:
  action: init
  mode: real
  outputJoinFile: /tmp/deck/join.txt
  podNetworkCIDR: 10.244.0.0/16
  criSocket: unix:///run/containerd/containerd.sock
  ignorePreflightErrors: [Swap]
```
